sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Antalpha Platform Holding (ANTA) price target decreased by 29.90% to 11.56
feed.summary: This article reports a significant decrease in the price target for Antalpha Platform Holding (ANTA). The target has been lowered by 29.90% to 11.56.

feed.title: Fidelity Bank to Acquire Affinity Bank in $142.8M Deal
feed.summary: Fidelity BancShares (N.C.), Inc. has announced a definitive merger agreement to acquire Affinity Bancshares, Inc. in an all-cash transaction valued at approximately $142.8 million. This acquisition will expand Fidelity's footprint into the Georgia market, creating a combined entity with $5.5 billion in total assets. The transaction is expected to close in the third quarter of 2026, pending regulatory and stockholder approvals.

feed.title: Fidelity Bancshares and its subsidiary Fidelity Bank have officially announced that they have reached a definitive merger agreement regarding the acquisition of Affinity Bancshares, Inc. and its subsidiary Affinity Bank.
feed.summary: Fidelity Bancshares and its subsidiary Fidelity Bank have reached a definitive merger agreement to acquire Affinity Bancshares, Inc. and its subsidiary Affinity Bank. This transaction signifies a crucial step in the strategic integration of the two financial institutions.

feed.title: Annexon (NASDAQ:ANNX) Releases Earnings Results, Hits Expectations
feed.summary: Annexon (NASDAQ:ANNX) announced earnings per share of ($0.32), meeting analyst expectations. The stock saw a slight dip to $4.96. Insider transactions were mixed with a director purchasing shares and an EVP selling, while hedge funds increased their holdings.

feed.title: Agnico Eagle (NYSE: AEM) to take Cascadia stake and fund Yukon exploration
feed.summary: Agnico Eagle Mines Limited plans to acquire a significant stake in Cascadia Minerals through a non-brokered private placement and additional unit purchases, totaling 29,315,300 common shares and 14,657,650 warrants, representing approximately 14.21% ownership on a non-diluted basis. Alongside this investment, Agnico Eagle will enter into an earn-in agreement for Cascadia's Catch property in Yukon and a strategic alliance to fund generative exploration in the Stikine Terrane, with Cascadia acting as operator. This allows Agnico Eagle to gain strategic Yukon exposure and potential majority interests in future projects.

feed.title: ADMA Biologics, Inc. (ADMA) Crashes 16% Amid Scrutiny Over Skyrocketing Days Sales Outstanding That Short Seller Claims Points to Improper Channel Stuffing, Hagens Berman Investigating
feed.summary: ADMA Biologics, Inc. (ADMA) shares crashed over 16% after short seller Culper Research accused the company of channel stuffing, using undisclosed related party distributors, and inflating reported growth by extending payment terms to distributors. Hagens Berman, a national shareholders rights firm, is investigating whether ADMA violated federal securities laws, focusing on the company's financial statements and internal control over financial reporting. The investigation emphasizes ADMA's skyrocketing Days Sales Outstanding (DSO) and alleged misrepresentation of revenue growth.

feed.title: [8-K] AEON Biopharma, Inc. Reports Material Event
feed.summary: AEON Biopharma, Inc. announced its financial results for the full year 2025, reporting a net loss of $39,222 thousand compared to a net income of $42,005 thousand in 2024. Despite the loss and a highly leveraged capital structure, the company advanced its ABP-450 biosimilar program with positive analytical data and favorable FDA feedback, and strengthened its balance sheet through a $6 million PIPE financing and debt reduction. The company expects to complete most analytical comparability work in 2026.

feed.title: Arcosa, Inc. (NYSE:ACA) Short Interest Up 25.6% in March
feed.summary: Arcosa, Inc. (NYSE:ACA) saw a significant increase in short interest in March, rising 25.6% to 1,135,262 shares. Despite a slight revenue miss, the company beat EPS estimates for the quarter, and analysts currently rate the stock as a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $120. Institutional investors hold a substantial portion of the company's shares.

feed.title: Alset Inc. (NASDAQ: AEI) extends $2.45M 3% convertible loan and warrants to DSS
feed.summary: Alset Inc., through its majority-owned subsidiary Alset International Limited, has finalized a material financing arrangement with related-party company DSS, Inc. This agreement involves a $2.45 million 3% convertible promissory note and warrants to purchase 16,554,055 DSS shares. The transaction, approved by Alset's Board and Audit Committee, with recusal of overlapping directors, is contingent on DSS stockholder approval and aims to provide both interest income and potential equity upside for Alset.

feed.title: Ameriprise reports 3.95M voting rights, topping 5% in Diversified Energy
feed.summary: Ameriprise Financial has disclosed a 5.056% stake in Diversified Energy Company, equating to 3,945,895 voting rights. This threshold was crossed on February 4, 2026, with the issuer notified on March 30, 2026, and all holdings are indirect via Ameriprise affiliates. The announcement follows recent corporate actions by Diversified Energy, including share repurchases and dividend declarations.

feed.title: REITs Are the S&P 500’s Highest Yielding Sector. Realty Income and 3 More to Buy Now.
feed.summary: Real estate investment trusts (REITs) offer some of the highest dividend yields in the current stock market, making them attractive for income-focused investors. This article highlights several REITs, including Realty Income, as top picks for purchase. The focus is on the strong dividend potential within the real estate sector.

feed.title: Valero Energy Corp Stock: A Leader in Refining Amid Energy Transition Challenges and Opportunities
feed.summary: This article analyzes Valero Energy Corp, a prominent independent petroleum refiner, examining its operational scale, financial health, and strategic adaptations in a volatile energy market. It highlights Valero's focus on downstream refining, its venture into renewable diesel, and its disciplined approach to shareholder returns, all while navigating sector dynamics and energy transition challenges. The piece offers North American investors insights into Valero's potential for long-term value, considering both risks and growth catalysts.

feed.title: Aehr Test Systems (AEHR) Projected to Post Earnings on Tuesday
feed.summary: Aehr Test Systems (AEHR) is projected to announce its Q3 2026 earnings on Tuesday, April 7th, with analysts expecting ($0.07) EPS and $10.846 million in revenue. The company previously exceeded EPS estimates but missed on revenue in its last quarter. Shares of AEHR were trading down approximately 7.4% at $30.11, with a market capitalization of $922.27 million and an average analyst rating of "Hold" with a $21 price target.

feed.title: Alaska Air names Microsoft executive to C-suite role
feed.summary: Alaska Airlines has appointed Lindsay-Rae McIntyre, formerly a Microsoft executive, as its new Head of Human Resources. She will replace Andy Schneider, who was recently promoted to CEO of Horizon Air, an Alaska subsidiary.

feed.title: Truist Financial Initiates American Tower Corporation (AMT) with Buy, Sees Long-Term Upside
feed.summary: Truist Financial initiated coverage of American Tower Corporation (AMT) with a Buy rating and a $205 price target, citing long-term upside in the towers business despite near-term challenges like slower organic growth and interest rate pressures. During their Q4 2025 earnings call, AMT's CFO Rodney Smith outlined projected 2026 organic tenant billings growth, anticipating around 1% consolidated growth, with stronger performance expected in Africa and APAC regions. The article also suggests that while AMT is a potential investment, there might be AI stocks with greater upside and less downside risk.

feed.title: Avalon Globocare (NASDAQ: ALBT) wins approval for reverse split and share issuances
feed.summary: Avalon Globocare stockholders have approved several proposals, including the issuance of shares related to convertible notes and a bridge note. They also approved the exchange of Series D Preferred Stock for common shares and the issuance of restricted shares under a consulting agreement. Crucially, the board gained authority to implement a reverse stock split at a ratio between 1-for-2 and 1-for-25 without reducing authorized shares.

feed.title: Aktis Oncology Announces FDA Clearance of Investigational New Drug Applications for AKY-2519 and Provides Business Updates and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
feed.summary: Aktis Oncology announced that the FDA cleared Investigational New Drug (IND) applications for AKY-2519, a miniprotein radioconjugate targeting B7-H3, enabling a Phase 1b clinical trial to begin in mid-2026. The company also provided business updates, including the Fast Track designation for its lead candidate AKY-1189, and reported financial results for 2025, showing increased R&D expenses and a net loss of $63.7 million. With a pro forma cash position of $562.1 million after its January 2026 IPO, Aktis anticipates funding operations into 2029.

feed.title: Allient (ALNT) VP trims stake with 6,000-share, $63 stock sale
feed.summary: Allient Inc.'s VP and Group President, Ashish Bendre, sold 6,000 shares of the company's common stock in an open-market transaction at $63.00 per share, totaling $378,000. Following this sale, Bendre directly holds 20,197.975 shares and indirectly holds an additional 1,155 shares through an ESOP Trust. The transaction is categorized as a high-impact filing with a negative sentiment, signaling a reduction in insider ownership.

feed.title: YPF Buys Back US$8 Million of Class XXX Notes Ahead of July 2026 Maturity
feed.summary: YPF Sociedad Anonima repurchased Class XXX notes totaling US$7.99 million between March 26 and March 30, 2026. This buyback, at 99.17% of par, is part of its active liability management strategy ahead of the notes' July 2026 maturity. The move aims to strengthen the company's balance sheet for bondholders and other stakeholders.

feed.title: ZenaTech Developing Proprietary Quantum Computing Hardware Platform for Defense, Infrastructure and Drone Fleet Projects
feed.summary: This article announces that ZenaTech is developing a proprietary quantum computing hardware platform. This platform is specifically designed for applications in defense, critical infrastructure, and drone fleet management projects. The development aims to leverage quantum computing's capabilities for these sensitive and high-demand sectors.

feed.title: 3 Reasons to Avoid XRAY and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
feed.summary: This article analyzes Dentsply Sirona (XRAY) and advises investors to avoid it due to declining constant currency revenue, previous growth initiatives losing money, and new investments failing to improve its Return on Invested Capital (ROIC). The company's stock is down 9.6% over the last six months, and its valuation, while seemingly cheap, is considered risky given its shaky fundamentals. Instead, the author suggests considering "one of Charlie Munger's all-time favorite businesses" and other market-beating stocks identified by StockStory's AI platform.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Raises CNQ Target on Strong Oil and Refining Margins
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has increased its price target for Canadian Natural Resources Limited (CNQ) from C$52 to C$66, maintaining an Equal Weight rating. This adjustment reflects strong oil, LNG, and refining margins, which are at their highest levels since 2022, and the expectation that these market conditions will persist. The firm also updated its price assumptions for 2026 WTI benchmark, NGLs, and refining cracks, leading to higher EBITDA estimates for North American energy companies.

feed.title: YD Bio (YDES) director files Form 3 with no share activity
feed.summary: YD Bio Ltd director Lee Jerry Yin-Chia has filed a Form 3 insider report for YDES, indicating no reported purchases, sales, or other insider transactions. The filing lists him as a director, with all transaction counts and share totals recorded as zero. This Form 3 filing confirms no insider trading activity from the specified director.

feed.title: [144] Xeris Biopharma Holdings, Inc. SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article details a Form 144 SEC filing by Xeris Biopharma Holdings, Inc. (XERS) dated March 30, 2026. The filing indicates a proposed sale of 10,834 common shares with an aggregate market value of $58,503.60, acquired as Restricted Stock Units on March 28, 2026. The sale is planned through Morgan Stanley Smith Barney LLC on NASDAQ.

feed.title: EV charging in days, no trenching: Xos targets facilities teams
feed.summary: Xos Inc. (NASDAQ: XOS) will showcase its mobile energy solutions at the Southern California Facilities Expo, April 8–9, 2026, targeting facilities managers with grid-independent EV charging that installs quickly without utility upgrades. The platform aims to protect energy budgets through dynamic load management and assist with WAIRE compliance. Xos emphasizes its solutions avoid common delays and costs associated with traditional EV infrastructure, having been deployed across over 100 global sites.

feed.title: WPP Establishes New U.S. Debt Indenture Framework for Future Note Issuances
feed.summary: WPP has established a new base indenture for U.S. dollar debt securities through a Form 6-K filing on March 30, 2026. This framework enhances the company's flexibility for future note issuances and strengthens protections for U.S. bond investors, leveraging legal opinions from New York, English, and Jersey law. The move streamlines WPP's capital markets infrastructure, allowing efficient access to U.S. investors and standardizing terms for future guaranteed notes, with Wilmington Trust and Citibank involved as trustee and registrar/paying agent, respectively.

feed.title: WisdomTree (NYSE: WT) raises $603.75M via 4.50% convertible notes due 2031
feed.summary: WisdomTree, Inc. has successfully raised $603.75 million through a private offering of 4.50% Convertible Senior Notes due 2031, yielding net proceeds of approximately $591.2 million. These notes are senior unsecured obligations maturing in October 2031 and are initially convertible at about $21.58 per share, with provisions for a higher conversion rate under specific corporate events. The issuance introduces new debt alongside existing convertible notes, providing financial flexibility but also potential future equity dilution.

feed.summary: The Travelers Companies, Inc. (TRV) is presented as a stable investment in the property-casualty insurance sector, valued by North American investors for its consistent dividend growth and resilient business model. The article details Travelers' diversified operations across personal, business, and specialty insurance, emphasizing its disciplined underwriting and strong competitive position. It also addresses sector drivers, macro influences, and risks such as catastrophe losses, while highlighting the stock's defensive qualities and appeal to income-seeking investors.

feed.title: ITW Remains Top Trading Value Despite 1.1% Drop and Insider Selling Spree
feed.summary: Shares of Illinois Tool Works (ITW) fell 1.10% on March 30, 2026, despite strong Q4 2025 earnings and optimistic 2026 guidance, while remaining a top trading value. The decline was accompanied by significant insider selling and mixed analyst sentiment, although institutional investors increased their holdings. The company demonstrates strong profitability and cash flow but faces concerns regarding its debt-to-equity ratio and market reassessment in the industrial sector.

feed.title: Vermilion Energy Inc Stock: International Oil Producer with Strong Dividend Yield and Recent Gains Amid Energy Sector Volatility
feed.summary: Vermilion Energy Inc. (ISIN: US92276F1003) offers North American investors exposure to diverse international oil and gas assets, with a focus on high-impact, low-decline assets across Canada, Europe, and North Africa. The company delivered strong gains in March 2026, driven by a resilient stock performance and a consistent dividend policy yielding around 4.6%, making it attractive to income-oriented investors. Analysts rate the stock as a "hold" with potential upside, highlighting its strategic asset diversification, strong financial health, and commitment to capital returns despite industry volatility and regulatory risks.

feed.title: Sompo Holdings Inc Stock: Strategic Acquisitions and Global Expansion Shape Investor Outlook for ISI
feed.summary: Sompo Holdings Inc, a Japanese insurer, is expanding its global presence through strategic acquisitions, notably the completed purchase of Aspen Insurance Holdings. This move strengthens its position in property and casualty markets, offering diversified exposure for North American investors. The company's strategy includes leveraging its stable Japanese domestic operations while pursuing international growth, alongside a focus on digital transformation, sustainability, and targeted investments to drive long-term shareholder value.

feed.title: Assessing Ziff Davis (ZD) Valuation After Removal From The NASDAQ Internet Index
feed.summary: Ziff Davis (ZD) has been removed from the NASDAQ Internet Index following a significant short-term share price increase. While one valuation model suggests ZD is 4% undervalued due to digital content and SaaS growth, its current P/E ratio of 33.5x is considerably higher than industry averages, indicating potential overvaluation and less room for error. Investors are encouraged to consider both the growth narrative and valuation risks.

feed.title: Fire protection firm buys 20,000 sq. ft. Somerset facility from PepsiCo
feed.summary: Approved Fire Protection has acquired a 20,000 sq. ft. industrial facility in Somerset, New Jersey, from PepsiCo. This former PepsiCo and Frito Lay site will become a regional distribution and service hub, strategically located to support the company's growth across the Northeast. The acquisition leverages the property's infrastructure and connectivity to major transportation routes, enabling Approved Fire Protection to expand its 90-year legacy of service to a growing customer base.

feed.title: Campbell Soup Co. stock faces analyst downgrades and margin pressures amid shifting consumer trends
feed.summary: Campbell Soup Co. (CPB) is experiencing analyst downgrades from Deutsche Bank and UBS due to margin pressures in its snacks segment and competitive headwinds despite reaffirming its Q2 2026 guidance. The company, a North American packaged food leader, is navigating shifting consumer preferences towards healthier options while emphasizing snacks growth and cost-saving initiatives. Investors are watching for margin recovery in Q3/Q4 and the stability of its dividend amidst these challenges.

feed.title: John McDonald Lowers PNC Price Target, Notes Macro and Structural Headwinds
feed.summary: Truist analyst John McDonald lowered the price target for The PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. (NYSE:PNC) to $234 from $240, maintaining a Hold rating due to macro concerns and structural pressures on bank stocks. Despite these headwinds, recent quarterly updates have been positive, and management commentary for the full year remains constructive. Jefferies, however, initiated coverage with a Buy rating and a $250 price target, citing expectations for strong returns and above-average net interest income growth.

feed.title: Wall Street Veteran Behind America’s First XRP ETF Says ‘XRP Community Is an Army,’ Says He’s Still Bullish
feed.summary: Sal Gilbertie, CEO of Teucrium, which launched America's first XRP ETF, describes the XRP community as an "army" following the fund's $500 million intake in 12 weeks. He remains bullish on Ripple due to its focus on fast global money movement and aggressive expansion. Gilbertie also emphasizes the importance of regulatory clarity for the crypto sector.

feed.title: FPL Awards Grants To Six Nonprofits In Escambia County
feed.summary: Florida Power & Light Company (FPL) has awarded grants through its NextEra Energy Foundation to six nonprofits in Escambia County. These grants aim to support various community initiatives including early childhood readiness, literacy, youth leadership, workforce development, grief counseling, and homelessness services. The recipient organizations are ReadyKids!, Central Gulf Coast Freedom Schools, Str8 Up Leadership Academy, Waterfront Rescue Mission, Ronald McDonald House Charities, and Valerie’s House.

feed.title: Is It Time To Reconsider Pfizer (PFE) After Diverging Valuation Narratives?
feed.summary: This article examines Pfizer's (PFE) valuation through two approaches: Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) and Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratio, both indicating Pfizer is currently undervalued. It then introduces "Narratives"—bullish and bearish case scenarios with differing fair values and assumptions for revenue, margins, and pipeline success—to help investors frame their own valuation perspective.

feed.title: Bio-Techne’s New COMET Spatial Tools Might Change The Case For Investing In Bio-Techne (TECH)
feed.summary: Bio-Techne has expanded its COMET spatial biology portfolio with new SPYRE Focus Panels, Amplification Kits, and upgraded HORIZON software, which could significantly enhance automated, high-plex tissue analysis. This innovation strengthens Bio-Techne's position in high-content, automated analysis for complex diseases, aligning with precision medicine trends. Despite potential near-term risks from biotech funding and tariffs, these advancements could positively influence the company's investment narrative, offering a potential 45% upside to its current price according to some fair value estimates.

feed.title: Astera Labs Stock Plummets 19% With 5-Day Losing Streak
feed.summary: Astera Labs stock has experienced a significant downturn, plummeting 19% and extending a five-day losing streak. The article provides the headline and indicates a substantial drop in the company's stock performance. No further details about the reasons for the drop are available in this content.

feed.title: EOG Resources Stock 6-Day Winning Spree: Stock Climbs 8.0%
feed.summary: EOG Resources stock has experienced a six-day winning streak, resulting in an 8.0% climb. The article seems to be an excerpt from a financial analysis platform, Trefis, and mentions data sources and terms of use. However, most of the content consists of navigation and site-related information rather than detailed stock analysis.

feed.title: Annexon Reports Positive Q4 and Full-Year 2025 Results, Highlights Key Milestones
feed.summary: Annexon, a biopharmaceutical company, announced positive Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results, highlighting significant progress in its immunotherapy programs for neuroinflammatory diseases. Key milestones include upcoming Phase 3 data for vonaprument in geographic atrophy, European MAA filing for tanruprubart in Guillain-Barré syndrome, and advancement of ANX1502 in autoimmune disease trials, aiming to address large underserved markets. The company's approach targets the classical complement pathway to provide meaningful functional benefits for patients.

feed.title: Rosen Law Firm Files Securities Class Action Against Aldeyra Therapeutics
feed.summary: The Rosen Law Firm has filed a securities class action lawsuit against Aldeyra Therapeutics, Inc. on behalf of investors who purchased the company's stock between January 1, 2025, and March 15, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Aldeyra Therapeutics made false and misleading statements about the results of clinical trials for one of its drug candidates, leading to artificial inflation of its stock price. This case highlights the importance of transparency and accurate disclosures for publicly traded pharmaceutical firms.

feed.title: Lindsey Oil Refinery worker's sadness ahead of final shift
feed.summary: A pipe fitter, David Cook, is expressing sadness as he prepares for his final shift at Lindsey Oil Refinery in North Killingholme. The refinery was taken over by an official receiver in June 2025 following its owner Prax's collapse and will be bought by Phillips 66. Cook, 63, worked for contractors at the site for 14 years and is among many facing job loss, though some employees have been offered roles with Phillips 66 or retained temporarily.

feed.title: GeneDx (WGS) CEO exercises 80K RSUs, sells 47K shares for taxes
feed.summary: GeneDx Holdings Corp. CEO Katherine Stueland exercised 80,000 restricted stock units (RSUs) and subsequently sold 46,933 shares to cover tax withholding obligations. These "sell to cover" transactions were non-discretionary and executed at weighted average prices between $60.93 and $65.61 per share. After these transactions, the CEO beneficially owns 91,514 shares of Class A common stock, along with additional RSUs and stock options.
